zh.lifeSummary: 當Jennet Fox於1549年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾米費爾德時，她的父親Edward Thomas Foxe28歲，母親Margaret Purrett28歲。她於1570年9月3日與Thomas Wilcock在英國越可爾米費爾德結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1598年10月15日在她的家鄉享年49歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jennet Fox于1549年出生在英国英格兰越可爾米費爾德时，她的父亲Edward Thomas Foxe28岁，母亲Margaret Purrett28岁。她于1570年9月3日与Thomas Wilcock在英国越可爾米費爾德结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1598年10月15日在她的家乡享年49岁。

nameMeanings.name: Fox
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname from a word denoting the animal (Middle English, Old English fox), widely used to denote a sly or cunning individual. It was also used for someone with red hair. In England this surname absorbed some early examples of surnames derived from the ancient Germanic personal names mentioned at Faulks and Foulks .
Irish: part translation of Gaelic Mac an tSionnaigh ‘son of the fox’ (see Tinney ).
Irish: also adopted for Ó Catharnaigh, see Kearney .

variants.name: Faulks
meanings: English: from the Anglo-Norman French personal name Fauque, Fauques, Fau(l)ques (oblique case Fau(l)que), originally an ancient Germanic byname Falco, meaning ‘falcon’.

variants.name: Foxman
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Charna, Isadore, Shmuel.

variants.name: Fuchs
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Hans, Kurt, Gerhard, Fritz, Mathias, Matthias, Armin, Ulrich, Erwin, Helmut.

German and Jewish: from Middle High German vuhs, German Fuchs ‘fox’, a nickname for a sly or cunning person, or for someone with red hair. This surname is also found in France (mainly Alsace and Lorraine), Poland, Czechia, and Slovenia, often as a translation into German of corresponding Slavic nicknames or surnames. Compare Fox 4, Fuks , and Futch .

variants.name: Kearney
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Seamus, Caitlin, Declan, Dermot, Donovan, Eamonn, Liam.

Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Catharnaigh ‘descendant of Catharnach’, a personal name meaning ‘warlike’. Alternatively, it may be from Ó Cearnaigh or Mac Cearnaigh (from cearnach ‘victorious’) or from Ó Ceithearnaigh ‘descendant of Ceithearnach’, a personal name meaning ‘foot soldier’.

History: Most present-day bearers of this name are descended from Tadhg Ó Catharnaigh, killed in battle in 1084. He was nicknamed An Sionnach ‘the Fox’, and for this reason the Irish surname was sometimes Anglicized as Fox . Denis Kearney, born in Oakmont, Ireland, in 1847, was a US labor movement leader.

nameMeanings.name: Jennet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Either a simplified spelling of   Jeannette   or a revival of a medieval pet form of the female name   Jean .

variants.name: Jeannette
meanings: diminutive form of Jeanne, feminine form of Jean ‘John’, now also used in the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When Jennet Fox was born in 1549, in Mirfield, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Edward Thomas Foxe, was 28 and her mother, Margaret Purrett, was 28. She married Thomas Wilcock on 3 September 1570, in Mirfield, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 15 October 1598, in her hometown, at the age of 49.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jennet Fox est née en 1549, à Mirfield, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Edward Thomas Foxe, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Margaret Purrett, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Wilcock le 3 septembre 1570, à Mirfield, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 15 octobre 1598, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 49 ans.

September 1570 in Mirfield, Yorkshire, England Thomas Wilcock geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 15. Oktober 1598 im Alter von 49 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

Lei sposato Thomas Wilcock il 3 settembre 1570, nel Mirfield, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 15 ottobre 1598, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 49 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Jennet Foxが1549年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアミルフィールドで生まれた時，父Edward Thomas Foxeは28歳，母Margaret Purrettは28歳であった。1570年9月3日にイギリスヨークシュアイアミルフィールドでThomas Wilcockと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1598年10月15日に故郷で49歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jennet Fox(이)가 1549년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 미르필드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Edward Thomas Foxe(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Purrett(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 1570년 9월 3일 영국 요르크실르 미르필드에서 Thomas Wilcock(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1598년 10월 15일 그녀의 고향에서 49세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jennet Fox nasceu em 1549, em Mirfield, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Edward Thomas Foxe, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Purrett, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Wilcock em 3 de setembro de 1570, em Mirfield, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 5 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jennet Fox родилась в 1549 г. в местности мирфиелд, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Edward Thomas Foxe было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Purrett, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Wilcock 3 сентября 1570 г. в местности мирфиелд, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 15 октября 1598 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 49 лет.
